title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE TALISAY PROVINCIAL HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TALISAY, PROVINCE OF NEGROS OCCIDENTAL, TO RAFAEL B. LACSON MEMORIAL HIGH SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. No. 24527 / 88 OG No. 28, 4493 (July 13, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7508, May 18, 1992 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE TALISAY PROVINCIAL HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TALISAY, PROVINCE OF NEGROS OCCIDENTAL, TO RAFAEL B. LACSON MEMORIAL HIGH SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Talisay Provincial High School in the Municipality of Talisay, Province of Negros Occidental, is hereby changed to Rafael B. Lacson Memorial High School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.) RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on April 5, 1990 and January 23, 1992, respectively.

(Sgd.) ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.) CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: May 18, 1992

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
